issues.title: Loan Simple leads receiving duplicate tasks in pre-referral and post-referral workflows
issues.desc: Loan Simple leads were generating duplicate tasks across multiple workflows including pre-referral, post-referral, and sale pending. The root cause was a bugged filter related to Loan Simple lead associations in HubSpot, which was confirmed by HubSpot support. HAs and TCs were receiving redundant task notifications for the same leads.
issues.workaround: Review any LS leads that received duplicate tasks during the impact window and manually close or dismiss the extra duplicate tasks to avoid double-processing.

issues.title: Post-referral workflow tasks not stopping when deal marked Closed Lost or Transferred
issues.desc: HAs continued receiving post-referral workflow check-in tasks even after deals were marked as Closed Lost or Transferred. The workflow lacked proper exit or suppression filters for these terminal deal stages. Madelaine made a tweak to the workflow filters on March 9th to resolve the issue.
issues.workaround: For deals marked Closed Lost or Transferred during the impact window that still generated tasks, manually dismiss those tasks and verify the deal is no longer enrolled in the post-referral workflow.

issues.title: Offer Accepted workflow not re-triggering after deal stage flipped back and forth
issues.desc: When a deal was set to Offer Accepted, then reverted to Referred Active or Committed, and then set back to Offer Accepted, the workflow tasks for collecting closing info did not re-trigger on the second Offer Accepted update. The root cause was that deal stage 'Offer Accepted' was not listed as a re-enrollment criteria in the workflow. Madelaine updated the re-enrollment criteria to fix this.
issues.workaround: For deals that went through a stage reversal and back to Offer Accepted during the impact window and did not receive TC tasks, manually enroll those deals into the Offer Accepted workflow to generate the required closing info tasks.

issues.title: Automated emails showing previous loan officer after LO change on deal
issues.desc: After a loan officer change on a deal, automated emails continued to display the previous LO's information instead of the updated one. The issue affected agent-facing automated emails which were still pulling the old LO name. Luis resolved the issue on March 13th.
issues.workaround: For deals where an LO change occurred during the impact window, manually review and resend any automated emails that went out with the incorrect LO information.

issues.title: MRC and TurboHome deals not enrolling TCs into Offer Accepted workflow tasks
issues.desc: Deals from MRC and TurboHome sources that were updated to Offer Accepted stage were not triggering the TC workflow or generating TC tasks. After investigation and a ticket with HubSpot support, the issue was confirmed resolved; some historical cases were attributable to leads being set to Offer Accepted before a prior bug fix was deployed rather than an ongoing workflow failure. TCs had to work these deals manually.
issues.workaround: For MRC or TurboHome deals updated to Offer Accepted during the impact window that did not generate TC tasks, manually enroll those deals into the TC Offer Accepted workflow to ensure closing tasks are created.
